LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART, $500.00 PER MONTH SHALL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S COMPENSATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Dec-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT P. SPRAGUE, TEL. NO. 932-8977 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
BURL A. TOLER JR., TEL. NO. (510) 812-0131, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is Granted in part, $500.00 per month shall be deducted from the judgment debtor's compensation. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
